videos.title: Whistler GranFondo in just over 2 minutes -. 2016
videos.description:
Over 3300m of up-hill ;-) and 122km cycling at an average of 25km/h with a max speed of 74km/h downhill what a rush.  

#thefondo
Music: www.bensound.com

videos.title: 🚲 This 50 euro bike was my friend for 16 fantastic years
videos.description:
📝 Description 
In this episode, I jump back in time to 2003 and move towards the present while taking a closer look at a bike that has served me for 16 years, weathering the good and the bad.
I'll show how I made my first big change to the bike, how I discovered hiking and everything else along the way.

📹 PREVIOUS: ⚡ Installing a proper rear rack on a full suspension Enduro or other electic bike - https://youtu.be/O0sj4tBONEg
📹 NEXT: ⚡500km in two days - Commuting E-bike - https://youtu.be/XKm-fBhorMo
----------------------------
Intro: 0:00
2004-The beginning: 0:13
2005-New parts: 2:27
2015-New bike appearance: 3:15
2016-First big tour, new tires: 7:08
2017-Brooks b17 saddle, electric motor? : 9:32
2018-First motor: 11:12
2019-Broken frame: 11:53
The future: 13:05
End/teaser: 14:27
----------------------------

📺 //Playlist//
Building an Electric Enduro in My Bedroom playlist ► https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKhlznhwLgsVOGI_9qi0Lvkjxhao6eQ-s
Enduro Touring Videos ► https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKhlznhwLgsVPq6SmjWyIPf96dkFvaWjg
Recumbent touring&mods ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JVSKdH2DG0A&list=PLKhlznhwLgsWfUefX4Rd73UC0K7XRJ5Fz
Misc Projects ► https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKhlznhwLgsVxXgJcI6r9kqOeEp7825GJ
Back to the Roots ► https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKhlznhwLgsU_afv6oiSKFoG9M0xqjlqI
